title: Mosaic AI Vector Search storage-optimized endpoints are Public Preview
body: Mosaic AI Vector Search now offers the option of storage-optimized endpoints. Storage-optimized endpoints have a larger capacity (over one billion vectors at dimension 768) and provide 10-20x faster indexing. Pricing is optimized for the larger number of vectors. For details, see [Vector Search endpoint options](/aws/en/ai-search/ai-search#endpoint-options).
